entry.title: Why I am building FireBack
entry.summary: I have started to build this software as a reusable product for PixelPlux Sp. z.o.o, company I found and manage. Over 2 decade of the software development that I am involved in, it's obvious that still vast majority of products lack of high quality user authentication flow. This flow is not limited to only signup/sign-in form but rather it's a problem with details.
